hero.title: Pancakes in Jüri – Blinny King
hero.subtitle: Large pancakes, cozy atmosphere and convenient ordering in Jüri.

home.popularTitle: Popular dishes people actually come back for
home.popularDescription: Four hero products to anchor the preview and show the tone of the menu.
home.lunchDescription: Every weekday from 11.00 to 15.00 we offer different pancakes with a -20% discount.

steps.oneText: Savory, sweet or lunch sets with clear sizes and portions.
steps.twoText: The preview includes both flows: location, basket and checkout.
steps.threeText: Discounts, stamps and reorder UX help grow repeat customers.

home.loyaltyTitle: Join and get a постоянный discount 👑
home.loyaltyText: ✔ −5% permanent discount on every visit · 🎂 −15% on your birthday · registration takes less than 1 minute.
home.reviewsTitle: Guests return for flavor, speed and warm service
home.reviewsDescription: Simple demo social proof for the preview.

cards.loyaltyText: Follow us and stay close to fresh news, promotions and daily offers.
cards.deliveryText: Built for takeaway, pickup and quick lunch delivery around Jüri.

menuPage.title: Blinny King menu
menuPage.description: Savory pancakes, sweet pancakes, lunch menu and combo deals.

hamCheeseClassic.name: Ham & Cheese Classic
hamCheeseClassic.description: Golden crepe with smoked ham, gooey cheese and herb butter.

salmonDillCream.name: Salmon Dill Cream
salmonDillCream.description: Lightly salted salmon, dill cream and pickled onion.

chickenMushroomMelt.name: Chicken Mushroom Melt
chickenMushroomMelt.description: Creamy chicken, roasted mushrooms and melted mozzarella.

spinachFeta.name: Spinach & Feta
spinachFeta.description: Warm spinach filling with creamy feta and herbs.

nutellaBananaDream.name: Nutella Banana Dream
nutellaBananaDream.description: Warm Nutella, sliced banana and roasted hazelnut crunch.

berriesCream.name: Forest Berries & Cream
berriesCream.description: Seasonal berry compote, whipped cream and powdered sugar.

caramelApple.name: Caramel Apple
caramelApple.description: Soft apple filling with caramel sauce and cinnamon.

curdBerries.name: Curd & Berries
curdBerries.description: Sweet curd filling with berries and powdered sugar.

lunchSoupCombo.name: Lunch Soup Combo
lunchSoupCombo.description: Soup of the day with mini savory pancake and salad.

lunchChickenSet.name: Chicken Lunch Set
lunchChickenSet.description: Savory chicken pancake, fresh salad and a weekday soup.

icedLatte.name: Iced Latte
icedLatte.description: Double espresso, cold milk and caramelized syrup.

familyComboFor2.name: Family Combo for 2
familyComboFor2.description: Two pancakes, two drinks and one shared dessert.

lunchComboDrink.name: Lunch Combo + Drink
lunchComboDrink.description: One pancake, one drink and a value lunch upgrade.

cart.title: Simple checkout preview with pickup or delivery
cart.description: Mock Stripe block only — no real keys, no live payment flow.
cart.stripeText: Card fields and payment intent are intentionally mocked for preview only.

about.title: A cozy pancake place in Jüri
about.description: Blinny King is a cozy and family-friendly pancake café in Jüri.
about.text1: We offer both savory and sweet pancakes (Ø30 cm and Ø40 cm), plus lunch offers. You can eat on site or conveniently take your order away.
about.text2: All pancakes are made fresh on site and you can expect warm and friendly service.

locationsPage.title: Built around Jüri, ready for the next spot
locationsPage.description: The first location is real in structure, the second is a clean expansion placeholder.

partnersPage.title: Become a Blinny King partner
partnersPage.description: Personal terms and offers for companies. Leave your details and we will contact you.
partnersPage.idea: Tell us about your volume, event or partnership idea

jobsPage.title: Work at Blinny King
jobsPage.description: Two mock positions and a lightweight application form.

contactsPage.title: Contacts
contactsPage.description: Find us in Jüri or contact us by phone and email.

account.title: Account
account.description: Log in, register or continue ordering without an account.
account.name: Full name
account.guestHint: Use any email and password — this is a demo login stored only in your browser.
account.emptyHistory: Your next orders will appear here.

data.review1: The savory pancakes taste homemade in the best possible way. Fast pickup too.
data.review2: Lunch combo is crazy good value and the place feels warm, not generic.
data.review3: Sweet bliny with berries was actually beautiful, not just sugar overload.
data.job1Description: Prepare pancakes, maintain prep station quality and keep service smooth during rush hours.
data.job2Description: Welcome guests, manage takeaway flow and coordinate delivery pickup timing.
data.location1Note: Main preview location with dine-in, takeaway and delivery zone.
data.location2Note: Structure reserved for the next opening.
